servers.description: 1C metadata search, code navigation, forms inspection, XSD schemas and validation
BSL syntax validation via BSL Language Server
Code templates library and implementation examples search
Graph-based metadata queries and impact analysis (Neo4j / Cypher)
1C code review and quality checking (1С:Напарник) — check_1c_code, review_1c_code, ITS docs
Standard Subsystems Library (БСП / SSL) function search

1C data management and analysis (HTTP service published on the infobase; URL is derived from INFOBASE_PUBLISH_URL in .dev.env by the installer). The endpoint MUST be reachable without a password — configure anonymous access in default.vrd (technical user with empty password), otherwise the MCP client receives HTTP 401/403 and the tools do not appear.
